stemHtml: What happens to the induced angle of attack when entering ground effect, and where will this change in angle be the greatest (wingtip or leading edge)?

options.a: The angle increases; greater at the wingtip.
options.b: The angle decreases; greater at the wingtip.
options.c: The angle decreases; greater at the leading edge.
options.d: The angle increases; greater at the leading edge.
